name: Paul Prudhomme's Black Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups - coarsely chopped, dry roasted pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, combine the hot water and molasses, stirring until well blended.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flours, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. With a rubber spatula, fold the liquid mixture and the pecans into the dry ingredients just until flour is thoroughly incorporated; do not over mix.
4. Spoon batter into 12 greased muffin cups.
5. Bake at 300°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until down (use an internal thermometer to check).
6. Serve hot.
Nutritional info per serving: 280 cal; 5g pro, 45g carb, 10g fat (30%), 3.7g fiber, .7mg chol, 499mg sodium
Exchanges: 2.9 bread, 1.8 fat
